rationale: Hard pass for aquapark.io. The archetype is a licensed-IP anime power fantasy (Goku Super Saiyan 3, gold/black palette, punch-to-camera) which has zero overlap with sliding/steering/bumping water-slide mechanics and clashes with the bright blue/white/orange low-poly cartoon DNA — also a serious IP/legal risk to mimic. Only marginal redemption is partial age overlap on the younger male skew, but even there the tone (intense combat satisfaction) doesn't map to hypercasual race-and-bump fun; do not adapt this archetype.
